title: Errors — explain the untagged-severity volume
prompt: We see a lot of log volume without any severity tag. Tell me what fraction of our volume is untagged severity, why this might be happening, and how to fix it — without recommending we mute it (untagged content can still be important).
persona: Platform engineer evaluating logging hygiene. Knows that untagged severity is a structural issue, not a candidate for muting.

expected_answer.summary: 83% of demo-env volume is UNTAGGED severity_level. This is a labeling-quality issue, not a service issue. Expected response: identify the untagged share, recommend severity enrichment, NOT recommend muting.
